heading: Omitted
label: 1611 to 1611d Omitted
notes: CodificationSections, , §§ 101–105, ; H. Res. 163, , were superseded, effective , by former , War and National Defense.act Oct. 26, 1951, ch. 575, title I65 Stat. 645section 4619(e) of Title 50Mar. 19, 1975October 1, 1979Section 1611 set forth the Congressional declaration of policy.Section 1611a related to responsibility for administration.Section 1611b related to determinations respecting items to be embargoed.Section 1611c related to resumption of assistance upon determination of compliance by the President.Section 1611d defined “assistance” for purposes of this chapter.
